subject.description: The email subject line for this reminder. Reference the invoice/fee-note number. Keep it concise and professional.

bodyHtml.description:
The letter paragraphs ONLY, as simple HTML (

…

blocks). Do NOT include the invoice facts table, the amount, the due date, or any payment link — those are rendered by the system frame. Write only the human-language message: greeting-free body paragraphs in the required stage tone.

bodyText.description: The same letter paragraphs as plain text (no HTML tags), for the plain-text approver payload.

reasoning.description: A short internal rationale for the approver: why this tone/framing was chosen given the stage, days overdue and relationship context. Not shown to the client.
